legs.summary: The adherence evidence reports that the spec solves the issue, with scope showing a linked issue and present spec. The listed items were graded as noise and no substantive gap was carried forward.

The adherence evidence reports the plan as underspecified against the spec. It identifies advisory gaps around explicitly carrying local-only/read-only constraints and stopped-worker warning behavior, while the core log-tail behavior is planned.
The adherence evidence reports that the code adheres to the plan. The command implementation, registration, primary test, and design documents are all represented as implemented plan items.
The mm-compliance evidence reports compliant with 0 divergences. No examined files or graded findings were provided for this leg.
The consistency evidence reports documentation updates as inadequate. It cites missing canonical dscli command reference coverage and a contradictory design spec log path contract.
The consistency evidence reports test updates as inadequate. It cites missing coverage through the dscli parser/import dispatch path for the new logs registration.
The security evidence reports PASS with no locked violations. No graded security findings were provided.
